<!-- Use this file to provide workspace-specific custom instructions to Copilot. For more details, visit https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/copilot-customization#_use-a-githubcopilotinstructionsmd-file -->
- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
	React TypeScript frontend with Flask Python backend and PostgreSQL database - Requirements clear.

- [x] Scaffold the Project
	Project structure created with React TypeScript frontend and Flask backend.

- [x] Customize the Project
	Created modular frontend structure with React Query, custom hooks, services, and components. Backend configured with Flask, SQLAlchemy, and REST API endpoints.

- [x] Install Required Extensions
	No specific extensions required.

- [x] Compile the Project
	Frontend compiles successfully, backend dependencies installed.

- [x] Create and Run Task
	Tasks created for frontend, backend, database initialization, and Docker services.

- [x] Launch the Project
	Project ready to launch. Use tasks to start services.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
	README.md completed with setup instructions and project structure.
